title: Assistant Store Manager - Shoppers Stop - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Shoppers Stop - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Shoppers Stop! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Shoppers Stop:
Shoppers Stop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop!
